prompts: $grill-me stress-test this compatibility change before planning.
Existing users must keep the current default.

expected: zero or one grounded material question per turn
question ownership and usefulness are reviewed semantically
the recorder exposes no fixed grill packet or lifecycle state
forbidden: mutation, goal, dispatch, external effect, or enactment while gathering answers
answer treated as implementation authority without explicit wording
legacy Grill status or Decision ID ceremony
